items.title: Seek forgiveness after salah
items.source: After salah. Bin Baz fatwa 13709; Dorar hadith KD9v9dxV.

items.title: Peace belongs to Allah
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ، وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma anta as-salam, wa minka as-salam, tabarakta ya dhal-jalali wal-ikram.
items.translation: O Allah, You are Peace, and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Possessor of majesty and honor.
items.source: After salah. Bin Baz fatwa 13709; Dorar hadith KD9v9dxV.

items.title: Completion of the hundred
items.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illa Allah wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulk wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir.
items.translation: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner or associate. His is the dominion, to Him be praise, and He has power over all things.
